The '''''Cerebus''''' was a [[Bulk cruiser/Legends|bulk cruiser]] that formed part of the Imperial [[Corrupter Task Force]]. It was commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Tains]].

After the Rebel defeat at [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], the ''Cerebus'' accompanied the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'']] in its pursuit of the [[Defiance Task Force]]. During this pursuit, the ''Cerebus'' was charged with assisting in the deployment of [[Probe droid/Legends|Probe droids]] across the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] in an attempt to track down the Rebels. This task ended in failure when a Rebel raid consisting of two [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor|A-wing]]s, one of them flown by [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]], struck the task force and destroyed the ''Cerebus''{{'s}} probes just as they launched. Among these probe groups was ''[[Diviner]]''.

==Behind the scenes==
The name ''Cerebus'' is based on [[Wikipedia:Cerberus|Cerberus]], the three-headed dog who guarded the underworld in Greek mythology, however is misspelled.<ref name="SW Blog">{{SW|url=news/drawing-from-the-imagination-mythological-creatures-in-star-wars-part-1|text=Drawing from the Imagination: Mythological Creatures in ''Star Wars'', Part 1|int=Back from the Drawing Board|nolive=1}}</ref>
